info.name: MeMaP - All Services (Gateway Token Relay)
info.description:
Postman collection for all MeMap microservices routed through the API Gateway (port 8090).

All authenticated requests use `Authorization: Bearer {{token}}` header. The gateway validates the JWT and relays it to downstream services via the TokenRelayFilter.

## Setup
1. Import this collection
2. Call **Login** first — the `token` variable is set automatically via the test script
3. All other requests use `{{token}}` via Bearer auth through the gateway

## Assignment file submission update
- Upload attachments to Storage Service first
- Use the returned `fileId` in assignment submission `fileIds`
- Submission responses now return `files` metadata plus `studentProfile` (with `avatarUrl`) for the UI
- Raw top-level `fileIds` and `fileUrls` are no longer exposed in the submission response payload

## Focus tracking update
- Roadmap Service now exposes focus tracking session APIs through the gateway
- Create sessions with claimed target minutes and actual focused minutes
- List the current user's paginated focus sessions across roadmaps
- Retrieve aggregate focus session statistics for dashboard/reporting use cases

## Services
- Profile Service (gateway: /profile)
- Roadmap Service (gateway: /roadmap, includes roadmap, assignment, quiz learning module APIs, and focus tracking sessions)
- AI Service (gateway: /ai)
- Storage Service (gateway: /storage)
- Notification Service (gateway: /notification)

body.raw:
{
  "name": "Java Backend Developer Roadmap",
  "description": "Complete path to become a Java backend developer",
  "roadmapCategoryId": "{{categoryId}}",
  "teacherIds": [],
  "studentIds": []
}

request.description: Create a new roadmap without nodes and edges
Create a roadmap with nodes and edges from AI output in one call
Roadmap detail response includes `totalStar` and `isStarred` (current user).
Paginated root comments. Response shape: PageResponse<CommentResponse>. Each comment/reply includes `likeCount`, `dislikeCount`, and `userReaction`.
Paginated root comments for a node. Response shape: PageResponse<CommentResponse> with threaded replies and reaction summary fields.
Allowed values: LIKE, DISLIKE, LOVE, HAHA, WOW, SAD, ANGRY, STAR
Allowed values: LIKE, DISLIKE, LOVE, HAHA, WOW, SAD, ANGRY, STAR

Create one focus session for the current user on the selected roadmap. Body only accepts `claimTargetMinutes` as a non-negative integer. The backend initializes `focusedMinutes` to `0`. If the response contains an `id`, it is stored in `{{sessionId}}` for the update request.
Update `focusedMinutes` for an existing focus session owned by the current user. Body only accepts `focusedMinutes` as a non-negative integer. Use the `sessionId` returned from Create Focus Session.
Get paginated focus sessions for the current user across all roadmaps. Results are ordered by `createdDate` descending. The roadmap service uses 1-based paging for this endpoint.
Get aggregate focus statistics for the current user. Response includes `totalSessions`, `validSessions`, `trashSessions`, `reachedClaimSessions`, `totalFocusedMinutes`, and `totalClaimTargetMinutes`.
This endpoint returns a boolean result and does not auto-populate {{categoryId}}

item.name: 📝 Learning Module (Roadmap Service)
item.description: Assignment and quiz APIs implemented inside `roadmap-service` and routed through the roadmap gateway.

body.raw:
{
  "title": "Java OOP Practice",
  "description": "Submit a short exercise about encapsulation and inheritance",
  "type": "TEXT_SUBMISSION",
  "visible": true,
  "startDate": "2026-02-01T08:00:00.000+00:00",
  "endDate": "2026-12-31T23:59:00.000+00:00"
}

request.description: Teacher only. Requires roadmap owner or EDIT access. Allowed types: FILE_UPLOAD, TEXT_SUBMISSION.
Lists assignments for a roadmap. Students only see visible assignments.

body.raw:
{

  "visible": true,
  "startDate": "2026-02-05T08:00:00.000+00:00",

request.description: Only valid for assignments with type FILE_UPLOAD.
Teacher-only listing of assignments created by the current user.
Student-only. Upload the file to Storage Service first, then submit the returned `fileId` in `fileIds`. At least one of `textContent` or `fileIds` must be provided.
Returns resolved `files` metadata and `studentProfile` (`userId`, `displayName`, `avatarUrl`) for the UI when attachments/profile data exist.

  "questionText": "What keyword is used to declare a constant in JavaScript?",
  "questionType": "SHORT_ANSWER",

  "correctAnswer": "const",

item.name: Check Active Attempt by Quiz
item.description: Student-only helper endpoint to decide whether the UI should START or CONTINUE a quiz attempt.

item.name: Start Quiz Attempt (Frontend)
item.description: Preferred student start endpoint from `StudentQuizAttemptController`; returns full attempt status with questions.

item.name: Auto-save Attempt
item.description: Matches `AutoSaveAttemptRequest` and can save answers plus flagged questions during an in-progress attempt.

item.name: Start Quiz Attempt (Legacy)
item.description: Legacy start endpoint from `QuizAttemptController`; still available for compatibility.

item.name: Submit Quiz Attempt (Legacy)
item.description: Legacy submit endpoint from `QuizAttemptController`; payload uses `selectedOptionId` and `textAnswer`.

item.name: Upload File
item.description: Uploads a file to Storage Service and stores the returned `fileId` in the collection variable. Reuse `{{fileId}}` in assignment submission `fileIds`.
